name: Vegetable-Cheese Casserole
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces pasta, cooked and drained (spiral, macaroni, egg noodles, spaghetti)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a large skillet, saute zucchini and mushrooms in butter until softened.
3. Add tomatoes, spinach, and salt. Simmer for 15 minutes.
4. Mix in cooked pasta.
5. Place in 9 x 13-inch casserole dish and sprinkle cheeses on top.
6. Bake for 5 minutes, or until cheese is melted.
